source_jobs.title: (Senior) Fullstack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Full-Stack Engineer, you will play a key role in building AI systems end-to-end. This is a fast-paced, hands-on role for engineers with high agency, strong technical depth and founder mindset. We’re looking for experienced builders with a strong product mindset and a track record of shipping complex web applications.

If you are a builder who thrives at the intersection of full-stack development and AI - this is your opportunity to working alongside a team of stellar engineers and shape how users interact with AI.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Core Engineering: Design and build high-performance, reliable systems that power Mercura’s AI products and ensure scalability.

 - End-to-End Ownership: Own features end-to-end from architecture and implementation to deployment, monitoring, and iteration.

 - Backend & APIs: Develop scalable APIs and backend systems that support evolving AI capabilities and product growth.

 - Product Engineering: Work closely with users and the product team to translate real-world workflows into clear product and engineering decisions.

 - Rapid Iteration: Ship improvements quickly through fast iteration cycles and pragmatic engineering decisions.

 - AI Integration: Contribute to LLM engineering and AI systems, collaborating with the team on how models are integrated into the product.

 - Technical Architecture: Help shape the overall system architecture, deployment strategy, and engineering tooling across the stack.




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Steepest possible learning curve: There's no faster way to grow than building a company from scratch. You'll be thrown into the cold water, do things no one has done before, and have founder-like freedom in your domain. Over five Mercura alumni have gone on to found their own companies and raise millions after their time with us.

 - Build something with real-world impact: We ship code that directly helps a massive, yet overlooked manual industry run more efficiently and sustainably. With us, you can work on AI that contributes to economic growth and stability on a huge scale.

 - Ownership over comfort: You own a real area end to end. No one stands between you and your problem. It's uncomfortable at times, and that's exactly why you'll grow faster here than in any normal job.

 - Exceptional colleagues: You'll work alongside experienced operators, ex-founders, Science Olympiad medallists, and top graduates from Google, Bain, MIT, TUM, Harvard, CDTM, Oxford, and Cambridge. The bar stays high because the people next to you are the biggest lever for your growth.

 - Radical clarity: You'll always know where the company stands and why we decide what we decide — the real numbers, the wins and the setbacks, and the thinking behind them. Your input is genuinely wanted, and the best argument wins.

 - Tools, no questions: Your own company card and any AI or productivity tools you need to do your best work, without approval theater.

 - Real shares: Real equity in Mercura with the most favorable tax treatment. No VSOP, no ESOP.

 - The everyday: Free team dinners up to 4x/week, UrbanSportsClub membership, a company bike, and team workouts 3x/week. Easy relocation to Munich — our office sits in the WERK1 startup incubator, with an apartment next door for around €800/month.





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Technical Skills & Experience:

 - Strong experience with full-stack software engineering (React, Typescript, Python)

 - Proven track record of architecting and building complex, production-grade software

source_jobs.title: (Senior) AI/LLM Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As an AI/LLM Engineer, you will play a key role in building agentic AI systems end-to-end. This is a fast-paced, hands-on role for engineers with high agency, strong technical depth and founder mindset. You’ll work on building reliable AI systems in production - from retrieval and LLM orchestration to tool-using agents and product integration.

If you’re a passionate builder who excels at the intersection of LLMs, data systems, AI, data engineering, and full-stack development, this is your opportunity to shape how users interact with AI in real-world workflows.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Agentic Systems: Design and build LLM-powered agentic systems end-to-end, from experimentation to production deployment

 - Retrieval & Context: Build retrieval and context pipelines (RAG, hybrid search, structured retrieval) to enable reliable reasoning over large volumes of technical and commercial data

 - AI Evals: Develop evaluation and monitoring systems to measure and improve AI performance in production

 - Data Pipelines: Build scalable pipelines to process and structure large volumes of unstructured documents and data

 - Feedback Loops: Implement automated feedback pipelines that allow AI systems to learn from usage data and human feedback

 - AI Infra: Own the architecture and reliability of AI systems in production, ensuring they are fast, scalable, and robust

 - Product Integration: Collaborate with other stellar engineers to deeply integrate AI capabilities into the product experience
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Steepest possible learning curve: There's no faster way to grow than building a company from scratch.  - Tools, no questions: Your own company card and any AI or productivity tools you need to do your best work, without approval theater.

 - Real shares: Real equity in Mercura with the most favorable tax treatment. No VSOP, no ESOP.

 - The everyday: Free team dinners up to 4x/week, UrbanSportsClub membership, a company bike, and team workouts 3x/week. Easy relocation to Munich — our office sits in the WERK1 startup incubator, with an apartment next door for around €800/month.





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

source_jobs.title: Founding People & Talent Lead
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

None of this can happen without the right people.

We're 16 today, on our way to 50 - which means the people we hire over the next year will decide whether Mercura wins the market and reaches global scale. At this stage, talent is the single most important lever we have.


As our Founding People & Talent Lead, you will build Mercura’s hiring engine from scratch.


You’ll own how we hire from day one, and help build how we onboard, develop, retain, and get the best out of the team as we scale. At first, ~80% of your focus will sit on Talent (where the real gap and biggest immediate impact are biggest). Over time, you will spend increasing time in the People function.


This is a founding role for someone who wants to build the Talent & People function of a high-growth AI company from the ground up. If you're someone with high agency who thrives in ambiguity, loves finding and closing exceptional people, and wants to leave a real mark on a company early, then this is your opportunity.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Build & own the full hiring engine: Lead recruiting end-to-end across all teams, from role definition and sourcing to closing exceptional candidates.

 - Make Mercura a talent magnet: Build an employer brand that makes the strongest people in DACH and beyond feel that Mercura is the place where they belong.

 - Scale the recruiting machine: Create the processes, analytics, workflows, and operating rhythm behind hiring.

 - Be a true sparring partner to the founders and team leads: Help define what great looks like for every role, challenge org design, sharpen talent planning, calibrate hiring decisions, and push back when the bar starts to slip.

 - Shape the people system as we scale: Work closely with the founders on performance calibrations, feedback rhythm, career progression, compensation benchmarking, and more.

 - Build Mercura’s network in the ecosystem: Grow our presence in the DACH startup and technical talent scene. Build relationships with top universities, host high-quality events, and create a warm network of outstanding operators, engineers, and commercial talent.




WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - 2–5 years of experience, with meaningful time spent in Talent, Performance, or org development topics in a high-growth environment such as a top startup or scaleup.

 - A very high bar for great people. You know what excellence looks like and do not lower the standard

 - Structured thinking and raw execution speed. You can design the system and run it yourself

 - Strong storytelling and relationship-building skills. You enjoy working with people, convincing them, and building long-term networks

 - Daily use of AI tools and curiosity to experiment with new workflows

 - Fluency in English, German is a plus

Note: Studies show that men often apply when they meet only part of the criteria, while women and marginalized groups tend to wait until they meet every requirement. If this role excites you and you believe you could grow into it, we’d love to hear from you.




WHY MERCURA

 - Own one of the highest-leverage roles in the company: Talent is the single largest scaling bottleneck we currently face, and your work will be instrumental to our success.

 - Work directly with the founders: You will have a voice in all strategic hiring decisions. You get to challenge, not just execute.

 - Own Talent & People as Mercura scales: This role starts where the biggest impact is: hands-on recruiting. But if you build it well, your scope grows with the compan

source_jobs.title: Founders Associate (Growth)
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re looking for our first Founder's Associate (Growth) to help us drive our company growth and market expansion.

This is a fast-paced, hands-on role for candidates who take initiative and get things done. As the right hand of our CEO, you will work side-by-side with us and translate data and insights into commercial impact.

If you're excited about growth and real ownership in the early stages of a venture - this is your opportunity to lead, learn and contribute.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Strategic Growth: Work directly with the CEO on strategic initiatives to drive company growth and market expansion

 - Sales Enablement & Operations: Own the infrastructure that keeps the commercial team effective - maintain CRM data quality, coordinate trade fairs and events, build playbooks and pitch decks, and design the workflows and frameworks that move deals from first touch to close

 - GTM Engineering: Source market and pipeline data to identify high-potential target accounts and continuously sharpen our go-to-market approach

 - Process Optimization: Analyze pipeline data, and turn insights into actionable improvements across the sales process

 - Market Expansion: Explore and validate new markets and identify strategic growth opportunities

 - Customer & Partner Success: Build, manage and close partnerships and drive customer expansion




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Learn to build a company: Over five Mercura alumni have gone on to found their own companies and raise millions after their time with us. At Mercura, you’ll take on real responsibility and gain the hands-on experience only possible in a high-growth startup.

 - Become our first Founder's Associate with guaranteed career advancement opportunities in a rapidly growing team

 - An ambitious and caring team that sees their work as more than just a job

 - Real shares in our company with the most favorable tax treatment - no VSOP/ESOP

 - Free team dinner (up to 4x/week)

 - UrbanSportsClub membership and access to a company bike

 - Easy relocation to Munich — our office is located in the Werk1 Startup Incubator https://en.werk1.com/coliving-apartments-munich/, where you can rent a 1-bedroom apartment right next to the office for just €800/month

 - Access to any AI or productivity tools you need




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Skills & Experience

 - You have 1-3 years of experience in fast-paced environments (e.g. startups, consulting, VC)

 - You have experience in building or scaling startups, own projects, student initiatives or driving sales

 - You a strong problem solver and and excel in taking full ownership of your work

 - You have strong customer empathy and business sense to understand customer pain points and needs

 - You are a strong and professional communicator in German & English

Personality Traits & Commitment

 - Your job is part of how you define yourself. You are fully committed to your work and achieving ambitious goals amid uncertainty.

 - You’re are entrepreneurial, hands-on, resilient and not afraid of doing unglamorous work

 - You are analytical, curious, highly organized, and take initiative to get things done

 - You’re outgoing, energetic, caring, and enjoy working with people

 - You are a team player who supports others and steps up to lead when needed.

 - You want to work in-person in Munich with a higher intensity than in a 9-5 job




WHY MERCURA

 - Steepest possible learning curve: There's no faster way to grow than building a company from scratch. You'll be thrown into th

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative (BDR)
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Business Development Representative, you’ll help drive our growth by building our outbound sales engine and creating new customer opportunities.

As the first point of contact for potential customers, you’ll identify pain points, generate leads, and convert interest into opportunities. You’ll work hands-on within a strong Sales team in a fast-paced environment, taking ownership of outreach, discovery, and relationship-building in the early stages of our sales funnel.

This role offers a fast track to developing your business career, with opportunities to advance from BDR to AE or other growth roles within just one year.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Prospecting: Own the full prospecting cycle - from identifying potential leads to engaging and converting them via phone, email, and social media

 - Lead Generation: Experiment with and implement new inbound and outbound lead generation strategies

 - Messaging: Develop deep product, market, and customer understanding to tailor pitches and close deals

 - Market Intelligence: Collaborate closely with GTM Engineering team to conduct in-depth market research to identify target accounts

 - Sales Enablement: Create and refine sales materials, scripts, and templates; lead internal knowledge sharing.

 - Customer Relationships: Engage with prospects daily and build strong relationships with potential customers.
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Proven ARR engine: We have a clearly defined ICP and generated $2M ARR with a single seller last year and short 1–3 month sales cycles.

 - Fast career advancement opportunities to AE within just one year

 - An ambitious and caring team that sees their work as more than just a job

 - Free team dinner (up to 4x/week)

 - UrbanSportsClub membership and access to a company bike - join our team workouts 3x/week

 - Easy relocation to Munich — our office is located in the Werk1 Startup Incubator https://en.werk1.com/coliving-apartments-munich/, where you can rent a 1-bedroom apartment right next to the office for just €800/month

 - Access to any AI or productivity tools you need




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You are motivated to build a category-defining company from the ground up and enjoy working hands-on.

 - You have excellent communication skills in German and feel confident speaking English.

 - You enjoy talking to customers, understanding their needs, and convincing them.

 - You are reliable, goal-oriented, resilient, and commercially sharp.

 - First experience in sales, business development, recruiting, consulting, customer-facing work, or another high-performance environment is a Plus.

 - You are willing to work five days a week from our Munich office with higher intensity than in a classic 9-to-5 job.

Note: Studies show that men often apply when they meet only part of the criteria, while women and marginalized groups tend to wait until they meet every requirement. If this role excites you and you believe you could grow into it, we’d love to hear from you.




WHY MERCURA

We bring extraordinary people together and deeply invest in your growth as your mentors, teammates and friends. We care, trust, and support one another, and we make sure that fun is at the heart of everything we do.

source_jobs.title: Senior Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Senior Account Executive, you'll be at the heart of our growth and own the process from first meeting to closed deal.

This role is for someone who knows how to earn the trust of senior decision-makers in traditional industries and translate complex workflows into clear business value.

Our co-founder Lukas built our first $2M ARR in just 12 months as the single seller entirely through outbound, with 2-8 weeks sales cycles and six-digit ACVs. We're now looking for someone ready to take that to the next level.

You'll work alongside our high-performing BDR team and own the process from first meeting through close, with warm and outbound-sourced pipeline handed to you to convert.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - New Business: Own your quota by qualifying and closing new customers

 - Customer Value: Guide prospects - often senior leaders in construction & supply chain - through their evaluation process and build compelling business cases that land

 - Sales Process: Run demos, handle negotiations, handle complex stakeholder landscape and close deals while continuously improving our playbook

 - Sales Strategy: Design and implement new strategies to win key accounts and expand into new markets.




WHAT WE OFFER

 - Proven ARR engine: $2M ARR in just 12 months by a single seller, outbound, with 2-8 weeks sales cycles and six-digit ACVs

 - Uncapped commission: Competitive base with uncapped bonus

 - A steep growth path in a fast-scaling team where top performers move fast

 - An ambitious, tight-knit team that takes their work seriously and genuinely enjoys working together

 - An upcoming company-wide offsite in San Francisco (September)

 - Free team dinners up to 4x per week

 - UrbanSportsClub membership and access to a company bike

 - Easy relocation to Munich, including discounted flats close to the office (from €800/month)

 - Access to any AI or productivity tools you need




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - You have 1-5 years of professional experience in mid-market/enterprise B2B SaaS/tech sales with a track record of exceeding quota

 - You can build credibility with senior, experienced stakeholders

 - You are strong in pipeline management, forecasting, and execution - resilient, gritty, and organised

 - You are confident leading product demos and translating complex workflows into clear business value

 - You are pragmatic, solution-oriented, and motivated to build something and grow with us

 - Initial experience with selling to traditional industries (e.g., construction, supply chain, the trades) is a plus

 - You want to work in-person in Munich, with occasional customer travel and a higher intensity than in a 9-5 job

 - Native-level German and fluent in English

Note: Studies show that men often apply when they meet only part of the criteria, while women and marginalized groups tend to wait until they meet every requirement. If this role excites you and you believe you could grow into it, we’d love to hear from you.




WHY MERCURA

 - In-office energy in an ambitious and caring team: Your future colleagues are experienced operators, ex-founders, Science Olympiad medallists, and top graduates from places such as Google, Bain, MIT, TUM, Harvard, CDTM, and Cambridge. We bring extraordinary people together and deeply invest in your growth as your mentors, teammates and friends. We care, trust, and support one another, and we make sure that fun is at the heart of everything we do.

source_jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Customer Success Manager, you will own the customer journey end-to-end - ensuring every user gets maximum value from Mercura. You’ll be involved throughout the full lifecycle: from expert discussions during sales, onboarding users, holding workshops, to expanding existing relationships.

Working closely with our product, sales, and engineering teams, you’ll translate customer feedback into actionable insights, influence the product roadmap, and drive product adoption. You’ll build strong, lasting relationships, proactively engage customers, and develop tailored success strategies that ensure satisfaction and measurable impact. As a trusted advisor, you help customers achieve their goals while advancing Mercura’s growth ambitions.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Customer relationships: Act as the main point of contact and trusted partner for our enterprise customers customers, driving satisfaction and long-term partnerships.

 - Lead onboarding and implementation: Guide customers through onboarding and implementation - ensuring quick time-to-value and long-term engagement.

 - Develop deep product and customer expertise: Develop a deep understanding of our software and customers, and champion customer needs in the product roadmap.

 - Value creation: Help customers unlock measurable savings and efficiency gains, and support them during key negotiations.

 - Own account success: Drive Mercura’s adoption through training and best practices, while managing accounts for retention, growth, and long-term strategic partnerships.

 - Cross-functional collaboration: Work closely with product, sales and engineering teams to ensure customer feedback shapes product development.

 - Shape your own role: Take ownership beyond the day-to-day, build new processes, drive your own projects, and leave a real mark on an early-stage company. For the curious and motivated, this role is as much an opportunity to grow personally as it is to deliver customer value.




WHAT WE OFFER

source_jobs.title: Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE)
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Forward Deployed Engineer, you will be the technical face of Mercura - the person who turns a signed deal into a live, working AI deployment.

You'll spend most of your time deep in technical work: integrating our software into complex enterprise systems, structuring customer data for AI, and adapting models to fit real-world workflows. But you'll also engage directly with users and senior stakeholders daily - debugging their problems, understanding their processes, and walking C-level stakeholders through a prototype you built overnight.

If you're a builder who gets energy from talking to customers and solving hard technical problems in messy, real-world environments - this role is for you.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Customer Implementation: Own the full technical implementation of our software after the sales handoff - from first kickoff to go-live. You are the person who makes it work.

 - AI Adaptation: Configure and finetune Mercura's AI for customer specific use cases - including prompt engineering and model behavior adjustments to match their domain and processes.

 - Data Structuring & System Integration: Bring customer data into shape and build customer system integrations (e.g., SAP, APIs)

 - Prototyping: Build prototypes that demonstrate new features or solve emerging customer problems and evolve them into scalable solutions

 - Customer Relationships: Engage daily with technical, senior business stakeholders and users at customer organizations. You translate their pain into engineering decisions - and back again.

 - Feedback Loop: Be the voice of the customer inside Mercura. Surface patterns, edge cases, and product gaps to the core engineering team with enough context to move fast.

source_jobs.title: Staff Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Staff Engineer, you will be the technical backbone of Mercura's engineering team - spanning multiple products and development streams. This is a deeply hands-on role for engineers who lead by doing: writing production code, solving the hardest architectural problems, and making the people around them meaningfully better.

We're looking for a highly technical engineers who want to ship core systems, strengthen architecture across products, and leave every codebase they touch in better shape than they found it. If you want outsized technical ownership without moving into management, this is your role.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Technical Leadership in Code: Own the most complex and highest-leverage engineering work across Mercura's product suite - building core systems, shared frameworks, and critical infrastructure that other engineers build on top of.

 - Cross-Product Architecture: Define and evolve architecture decisions across multiple products. You'll make the calls that prevent architectural dead-ends two years from now.

 - Hands-On Execution: Spend the majority of your time writing and shipping code. You lead by example - when something is hard, you're in the trenches.

 - Engineering Quality: Eliminate technical debt by refactoring abstractions and raising reliability, standards across all teams.

 - Technical Mentorship: Elevate the engineers around you through code review, pairing, and direct feedback. Help teams deliver consistently without burning out or accumulating hidden risk.

 - AI Systems: Contribute to the architecture and implementation of Mercura's AI capabilities - from LLM pipelines to data infrastructure - at the intersection of performance and product quality.
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Actual ownership: You own a real area end to end. No one stands between you and your problem. It's uncomfortable at times, and that's exactly why you'll grow faster here than in any normal job.

 - Exceptional colleagues: You'll work alongside experienced operators, ex-founders, Science Olympiad medallists, and top graduates from Google, Bain, MIT, TUM, Harvard, CDTM, Oxford, and Cambridge.

 - Build something with real-world impact: We ship code that directly helps a massive, yet overlooked manual industry run more efficiently and sustainably. With us, you can work on AI that contributes to economic growth and stability on a huge scale.

 - Radical clarity: You'll always know where the company stands and why we decide what we decide. Your input is genuinely wanted, and the best argument wins.

 - Steepest possible learning curve: There's no faster way to grow than building a company from scratch. You'll take real responsibility, do things no one has done before, and have founder-like freedom in your domain. Over five Mercura alumni have gone on to found their own companies and raise millions after their time with us.

 - Tools, no questions: Your own company card and any AI or productivity tools you need to do your best work, without approval theater.

 - Real shares: Real equity in Mercura inclduing voting rights, with the most favorable tax treatment. No VSOP, no ESOP.

 - The everyday: Free team dinners up to 4x/week, UrbanSportsClub membership, a company bike, and team workouts 3x/week. Easy relocation to Munich — our office sits in the WERK1 startup incubator, with access to apartments next door from around €800/month.





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 8+ years of software engineering experience, with a track

source_jobs.title: Customer Support Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As Mercura’s AI agents become the core infrastructure on which our customers operate on, one thing becomes increasingly important: customers need to trust that Mercura works as any time, as their real business depends on it.

That means customer problems cannot disappear into a ticket queue. When a quote is wrong, an integration behaves unexpectedly, or a workflow breaks in production, someone needs to understand what actually happened technically and drive it to resolution.

The person who makes sure everything runs fabulously - that will be you.

As our first Support Engineer, you will own technical customer resolution end-to-end. You will investigate and reproduce problems, dig into logs and data, identify roots causes and fix issues yourself. And you’ll work closely with product and engineering to design a deeper product change.

If you're a software engineer with 1+ year of experience who enjoys debugging real production issues, talking to users, and owning problems end-to-end, this role is for you.




WHAT YOU WILL BE WORKING ON

 - Debug real customer problems: Investigate production issues across product, data, integrations, and workflows. You will dive deep into logs, databases, customer examples, and the codebase to understand what is going wrong.

 - Be super close to our customers: Talk directly to users, understand their problems, explain what is happening, and make sure they feel taken care of.

 - Drive customer support automation: You will design AI agents that handle real customer interactions and resolve issues faster than most humans could, while knowing exactly when to hand off.

 - Make engineering faster: You’ll deploy and manage AI agent teams that help investigate and resolve customer issues, deciding when human input from core engineering is needed. For issues that require escalation, you’ll ensure there is a clear technical write-up, covering what happened, how to reproduce it, relevant data, and where the issue likely sits.

 - Turn repeated problems into better systems: Document recurring issues, improve workflows, build internal playbooks, and help product and engineering see where the real customer issues are.




WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR

 - At least 1 year of experience in full-stack software engineering (React, Typescript, Python, Postgres)

 - You have shipped production code before and understand how software behaves outside of a perfect development environment.

 - You can debug independently across logs, databases, APIs, and unfamiliar code.

 - You enjoy customer-facing work and see talking to users as the fastest way to understand what matters.

 - You are structured, reliable, and care about people.

 - German at B2 level or above is required, because many of our customers are German. English should be strong enough to work with an international team.

You are based in Munich or willing to relocate. We work together in person.




WHY JOIN MERCURA

 - Own a role that directly affects the company's success: Your work directly impacts customers moving billions in goods across two continents. You will shape whether they feel blocked, confused, confident, or genuinely excited to use Mercura in daily operations.

 - Work very close to product and engineering: You will see first where customers struggle, what they need, and where the product should improve.

 - Build for a market most people underestimate: We automate work in a $12T+ industry that still runs on emails, PDFs, phone calls, and manual ERP processes. The pain is real, th

source_jobs.title: Solution Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Mercura (YC W25) helps the companies that build the real world move at software speed, automating the back-office work that runs the $12 trillion industry behind every hospital, school, and power plant. We started with one of their biggest bottlenecks - turning messy technical requests into accurate quotes - and grew to $2M ARR in our first year. With a team of 16, we're now targeting $10M by the end of 2026 as well as our expansion into the US.




ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a technical role at the center of how we win enterprise deals. Our customers are technical suppliers: industrial, careful with their buying decisions, and often disappointed by software before. They don't decide based on a pitch. They decide when they see Mercura take one of their own messy quote requests and return a correct quote, on their data.

That is hard to do well. Real requests are unstructured, product catalogs are complex, and quotes run through ERP systems that every customer configures differently. A standard demo rarely survives the first real edge case.

So most enterprise deals come down to one question: can someone make Mercura work, credibly, inside this specific customer's setup? If this sounds exciting, this role is for you.





YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

You own the technical side of every major deal, from the first demo to a signed customer.

 - Understand the customer's reality. Get into the customer’s actual workflows and identify the case that best shows what Mercura can do for them.

 - Lead the technical conversation. Join sales conversations and be the credible counterpart on integrations, data, security, and architecture. Resolve the concerns that stand between the customer and a buying decision.

 - Build the proof. Set up demos and proof-of-concepts on the customer's real data that you prepared and structured. Build prototypes for new features, and make customers feel that Mercura works in their own context rather than an idealized one.

 - Feed insights back to the team. You're often the first to see why a deal stalls. Judge whether a customer request is demo-only, a quick customer-specific build, or something that needs core product and engineering - and translate that into clear, prioritized input for the team.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - Native-level communication in German: You can explain clearly, present well to senior stakeholders, and stay composed when a demo is tested in real time.

 - You’ve worked for 2+ years in a Solution Engineering, technical customer success, technical consulting or similar.

 - You have technical understanding. You can reason about our customers' systems, integrations, and build a convincing, working proof yourself. You can write code in JavaScript and Python, are comfortable with APIs, and have a feel for integration architectures.

 - You hear the real problem behind a customer’s request. You translate complex concepts for non-technical stakeholders, turn customer needs into buildable specs, and make abstract products feel tangible through demos that close deals.

 - Commercial judgment. You read a room, identify the real blocker, how to speak a customer's language, and move deals forward.

 - You want to work in an in-person, high-intensity environment in Munich

Note: Studies show that men often apply when they meet only part of the criteria, while women and marginalized groups tend to wait until they meet every requirement. If this role excites you and you believe you could grow into it, we'd love to hear from you.





WHY JOIN MERCURA

 - A foundational role. As our first Solution Engineer, you build the demo environment, the proof-of-concept approach, and the technical-sales motion, rather than inheriting them.

 - Direct influence on the product. You sit one step from product and engineering, and what you learn in deals shapes what we build next.

 - A large, underserved market. We automate the manual ERP work in a $12T+ industry that still runs on emails, PDFs, phone calls, and manual

notes: YC-backed startup with strong engineering focus, expanding into the US
